parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_meetup.search_results (id, search_id, search_name, title, description, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  (SELECT id FROM s_meetup.searches_monitored WHERE name = '{{ $json.search_name }}' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.search_name }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, description = EXCLUDED.description
RETURNING id, search_id;

=INSERT INTO s_meetup.searches_monitored (id, name, search_url, active)
SELECT (val->>'id')::integer, val->>'name', val->>'search_url', true
FROM json_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.searches || []) }}'::json) AS val
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, search_url = EXCLUDED.search_url, active = true;
